user_query:
Hey! Can you help me get our theology study group organized for the week of 2024-10-14 using the files in input/? Please:

1) Read input/syllabus.md, input/meeting_times.csv, input/tasks.json, input/notes.md, and input/roster.csv, and produce a weekly summary at outputs/weekly/2024-10-14_summary.md covering 2024-10-14 through 2024-10-20 (inclusive). The summary must have these sections with exactly these headings in this order:
- Week
- Meetings
- Readings
- Deadlines
- Open Questions
- Discrepancies

Populate them as follows:
- Week: show the date range (2024-10-14 to 2024-10-20) and the main topic for that week from the syllabus (Week 4).
- Meetings: list meetings from input/meeting_times.csv whose date falls within the range, with date, start_time–end_time, and location.
- Readings: list readings for Week 4 from input/syllabus.md.
- Deadlines: list items from input/tasks.json whose due falls within the range (inclusive), with their titles and due date/time as written in the JSON. Exclude items due outside the range.
- Open Questions: extract and list the bullet points under the "Open questions for next time" section in input/notes.md.
- Discrepancies: check that the syllabus’s Week 4 deliverable "Reflection journal #2" due date/time matches a corresponding task in input/tasks.json (case-insensitive title match containing "Reflection journal #2"). If they match exactly, write "No date discrepancies found for Reflection journal #2." Otherwise, list both dates/times shown in each source.

2) Draft a plain-text group email at outputs/weekly/2024-10-14_email_draft.txt with the first two lines:
- To: a semicolon-separated list of emails from input/roster.csv (in the order they appear)
- Subject: Study Group – Week of 2024-10-14: Theodicy and Suffering

Then include a short body that:
- Mentions the earliest meeting during 2024-10-14 to 2024-10-20 with its date, time range, and location from input/meeting_times.csv.
- Provides a bullet list of the Week 4 readings from input/syllabus.md.
- Provides a bullet list of all deadlines due during 2024-10-14 to 2024-10-20 from input/tasks.json (include each item’s title and due date/time as written).
- Includes an "Open questions" bullet list using the same items you placed in the summary.

Use only the provided files to compile the content. Save both output files exactly at the specified paths. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
